name: frontier_market
description: Battle Market hall clear, MANAGER-OWNED (FrontierManager.marketBuy, alpha.16 real-mechanics wave): every fight is bought off Market Mogul Sterling's stall via `cobblemon-initiative frontier market buy <bargain|fair|premium>` (fee 200/500/1000 CD through the frontier/fee pay-probe; the stall auto-serves the next uncleared opponent ch1 Vance -> ch2 Fiona -> the Mogul; bargain locks the floor at 40, fair at 70, premium fights Sterling as authored at 100; purses 400/1200/3000 paid by the manager as '[Frontier] Purse paid: N CD' + defeated_* tags + frontier_market_cleared/hall_cleared on the brain). Vance/Fiona dialogs are pure flavor now - no battle buttons anywhere in the hall; their beaten entries (fed by the manager-set tags) carry the old win_line prose. BROKE lane runs FIRST: wallet set to 50, bargain click -> 'Declined - the stall does not run tabs' chat, no dispatch, no tags. Then fund 5000 and buy the ladder up. The champion gate is opened by tag surgery (royal_league_champion - gate.champion lowers to that player tag); stripped in cleanup. NOTE the market group is CO-LOCATED on the Port cluster (casting brief: both at 'Battle Frontier - Battle Port'; shipped RCT coords put the challengers at z2993.5, brain z2999.5 - the Port trio sits ~5b away, all inside one find_npc radius). Full display-name needles keep matches unique - beware the 'Stern'/'Sterling' stem collision: 'Captain Stern' and 'Market Mogul Sterling' both contain 'Stern', so never shorten those needles. Fights run under dev-bot autobattle with 6x lv-100 wonder Raikou: locked fights flatten CLONES (attrition-free) so the wonder team wins those too; premium is Sterling at full authored strength (brain-fight solo-verified). Win waits target the manager rail ('Purse paid' chat + rcon tag asserts), NOT trainer say lines - manager fights have no onwin. Site is inside the frontier_active region-tick AABB (Nuzlocke faint paths suspended); atlas re-survey open, hence _probe_pending. KNOWN CAVEAT: intermittent TBCS battle-init stall / rare showdown wedge - a win-wait timeout is almost certainly that, not a hall regression; re-run before filing.

steps.comment: -- preamble: close any leftover dialog, sweep a stale battle --

-- tp FIRST (loaded chunks for the kill sweep + the 40b latches spawn Vance/Fiona/Sterling on a fresh world). Coordinate is the shipped RCT market stall line (ch1 3797.5 / ch2 3803.5 at z2993.5, brain 3800.5 z2999.5), stood 2b north - _probe_pending until the first live run confirms the floor --

steps.comment_: plateau is outside any safe zone; frontier_active only suspends Nuzlocke faint paths, not real mob damage

steps.comment: -- reset (idempotent re-runs): every tag this scenario or the manager sets, plus the champion gate surgery. No latch resets - the bodies persist and are never killed here --

steps.comment_: gate.champion lowers to this player tag; stripped in cleanup
band_tags must re-derive the no_* inverses after the removals before any dialog opens

steps.comment: -- lane sanity: champion gate open, nothing defeated, hall uncleared --
-- party reset: junk parties stall TBCS battle init (verified live). Empty all six slots, then 6x lv-100 wonder Raikou --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon raikou level=100 ability=wonderguard held_item=cobblemon:air_balloon moves=icebeam,surf,thunderbolt,flashcannon
steps.comment_: WONDER TEAM (showrunner idea 2026-07-19, brain-fight solo-verified): pure Electric's only weakness is Ground -> Air Balloon negates it; Wonder Guard blocks everything else and the balloon never pops (nothing lands). Slot-1 Ice Beam: accurate, NO type is immune (an Electric lead vs enemy Ground-types would zero-damage-loop under first-legal-move autobattle). Locked stall fights flatten CLONES of these - Wonder Guard rides the flatten.

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon raikou level=100 ability=wonderguard held_item=cobblemon:air_balloon moves=icebeam,surf,thunderbolt,flashcannon

steps.comment_: cross-scenario attrition guard (live-caught 2026-07-18: fights entered with fainted leads make autobattle pass turns forever = endless slow loss)

steps.comment: -- frontier residue strip (2026-07-18): failed runs skip cleanup, so cleared/defeat tags leak across attempts and reroute gated entries (the 'open Warden door' false alarm) --

-- brain latch re-arm (2026-07-19): a consumed fight leaves the brain BODY gone with #amb=1 - every later run finds nothing (all 7 brains were bodiless by round 4; three scenarios then false-matched STALE buffer win lines). Kill any stale body + reset the latch; the 40b approach respawns him fresh. --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle on

steps.comment: -- beat 0, BROKE lane: wallet set to 50 (under the 200 CD bargain fee), click the listing -> the fee pay-probe declines NEXT TICK (deferred read), no dispatch, no tags. Runs FIRST so a declined click can never eat a cleared ladder --

steps.comment_: the stall listings render = champion gate open (gate.champion on every listing button); button labels are stable across the say[] rotation

steps.wait_chat: the stall does not run tabs
steps.comment_: manager decline chat ([Market] Declined - the stall does not run tabs. (200 CD)); the fee actionbar twin fires the same tick
band tick settle before reading the inverse tag
declined = no dispatch: Vance still undefeated, hall still uncleared

steps.comment: -- fund the ladder: 5000 CD covers all three listings (200+500+1000) with margin --

-- beat 1: bargain lot -> the stall serves Merchant Vance (first uncleared). Locked at 40 (clone-flatten, attrition-free). Win signal = manager rail: Sold chat, then Purse paid 400 + defeated_market_challenger_1 --

steps.comment_: between-fights heal (live-caught: a fainted lead makes autobattle pass-loop to a slow loss in the NEXT fight)
listing buttons carry their own CLOSE action - the dialog drops and the fee resolves next tick
manager dispatch ack ([Market] Sold. The bargain listing takes the floor - purse 400 CD.); needle avoids crossing the embedded color-code boundaries
manager win rail; a timeout here is almost certainly the TBCS stall, not a regression
defensive: the battle GUI may still be up when the win chat lands - a stale screen eats the next interact (live-caught arcade/factory/port)
battle teardown settle before the next stall dispatch

steps.comment: -- beat 2: fair price -> the stall serves Trader Fiona (locked at 70). Purse 1200 --

-- beat 3: premium stock -> the stall serves the Mogul himself, fought AS AUTHORED (level 100, no lock). Win chain is all manager: defeated_frontier_brain_market + frontier_market_cleared tags, frontier/hall_cleared actionbar, Purse paid 3000 --

steps.comment_: frontier/hall_cleared actionbar - fired by the manager right before the purse chat, same wait window (consecutive wait_chats share the cursor)

steps.comment: -- beat 4: cleared-state dialog - Sterling's beaten entry (prio 20, gate frontier_market_cleared) preempts the stall; prose any-of covers all four rotating say lines (three originals + the folded win_line Zoroark beat) --

expect_screen_text: The harbormaster of this dock is you now, whether you wanted the title or not. Fresh challengers still arrive every dawn - they will be arriving for you.

I ran a fair market for a long time after the old owners stopped watching. You closed it cleaner than they ever did. There is a doorstep past the last generated ridge with your name on it. Go find it.
I half know that face, and I will keep the half I know to myself. Enough of us do. The Market is yours - and so is anything the tide still brings in to sell.
Every asset on my books, spent. That Zoroark wore three faces and you saw through all of them. The Port has a new mogul, and it is not me. Go on to whatever waits past the map.

steps.comment: -- beat 5: challenger beaten flavor - the manager-set defeat tags must open the SAME dialog gates the button battles used to (contract: existing gates keep working). Vance beaten entry gates defeated_market_challenger_1; any-of covers his three rotating lines incl. the folded win_line --

expect_screen_text: Sold out, cleaned out - you bought the whole stall, and I am not restocking against you. The Mogul keeps the last word in this hall.
No hard feelings - a duel-for-hire loses sometimes. The Port turns over daily, so I will have a new pitch by morning.
Clean transaction. You took the stall apart piece by piece. The Port respects a buyer who pays in full.
Balanced my books the hard way - you took the lot. The entry stands on my ledger in your ink; what you won, you keep.
A trade is a trade, and this one went to you. Fresh challengers daily down here - I might be one of them again tomorrow.
Sold. You drove a hard bargain and walked off with the whole crate. That is the Port for you - it rewards the sharp.

steps.comment: -- cleanup: strip everything this scenario set so no other scenario inherits the lane; CD purses ride (the prize rail has no reset) --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle off
